experience.description: Leading a team of 6 engineers in migrating legacy .NET applications to a modern microservices architecture on Azure.
achievements: Spearheaded transition of monolithic .NET Framework codebase to ASP.NET Core microservices, cutting legacy infrastructure costs by 32%.
Pioneered internal developer platform template adopting strict TypeScript patterns, shortening onboarding cycles for new engineers by 50%.
Established high-concurrency event messaging pipelines processing up to 500,000 daily messages using Azure Service Bus.

experience.description: Developed core SaaS features using React and Node.js. Optimized database queries resulting in 30% faster load times.
achievements: Authored highly optimized full-text searching functionality in PostgreSQL, reducing query execution delays from 1.2s to 80ms.
Refactored multi-tenant state management workflows utilizing React and Redux, preventing duplicate network telemetry updates.
Developed custom CI/CD automation procedures with Docker, reducing average engineering release intervals by 40%.

experience.description: Supported the development of internal tools and automated testing suites for enterprise ERP systems.
achievements: Built automated End-to-End browser test sequences covering core invoicing journeys, blocking 15+ production-critical regressions.
Maintained internal administrative inventory panels, modernizing deprecated client-side routing modules.
Created custom database seeding CLI scripts in Node.js, accelerating local sandbox setups by 5x.
